title: sorbus aria var. arioides
intro: Sorbus aria var. arioides, also known as the mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. The health benefits of Sorbus aria var. arioides include reducing inflammation, fighting against fungal infections, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in its dried form as a powder for various herbal remedies.
